channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Faded Stoplines, 13th April
item.description:
E -Phase and F-Phase stop lines have faded.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southbury Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 118A Durrington Road,, 13th April
item.description:
This frigde has been were for one month. This is a health and safety because we can't remove our black waste bin because the fridge is blocking the way. We're afraid that might fall on us.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durrington Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can this vehicle be removed please as it is blocking a dropped kerb, 13th April
item.description:
Please can this vehicle be inspected and removed if possible please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wanstead Close, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge freezer., 13th April
item.description:
Please remove dumped fridge freezer on a council maintained road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brabourn Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked in front of the gates of no 321-323 Weedington road which is supported living care home., 13th April
item.description:
Several bikes&escotters parked this Sunday12.4.26 In front of the gates of supported living care home. Address 231-323 Weedington Road W14PR I have enclosed photos,blocking access to the gates
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 321-325, Weedington Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter no bins, 13th April
item.description:
Litter park rd side of shop in st mary cray high street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 263, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All lights are not working in the alleyway, 13th April
item.description:
This has been reported many times and still not fixed. Last week a woman was mugged in this alleyway as its pitch dark there ,this is extremely dangerous
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Darenth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: All out - three or more street lights in a row

item.title: Road surface at traffic lights is poor, 13th April
item.description:
Another report over a month old said this should be repaired. Why has this not yet been done?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose or faulty Manhole in the road., 12th April
item.description:
Every time a vehicle drives over the Manhole which is morning noon and night, there is a severe noise disturbance both inside the home, either upstairs or downstairs in the home, causing disturbance to sleep as well as everyday habitanncy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113, Burnt Ash Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on red shop shutter at 274- 280 Brixton road SW9., 12th April
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed on a red shop shutter at 274-280 Brixton road SW9. The shop is called the Bed Company. The graffiti has recently been put there. Please can it be removed. There is also graffiti across the road st the left hand side of the Jamm bar sprayed on a black wooden fence.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 286,288, Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kitchen work top dumped in parking area., 12th April
item.description:
Kitchen work top dumped in parking area for the past few weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brindley Close, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More railings down, 12th April
item.description:
These have either been down a long time and not dealt with or it is another section down. Please repair with concrete posts as already done to other sections. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on path to park, 12th April
item.description:
Please check and clear. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Barnfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped on pavement opposite 63-61 Wrottesley Road, 12th April
item.description:
Photo taken 12th April 2026. Old sofa fly tipped here overnight.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keeble Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big hole in the fence, 12th April
item.description:
Big hole in the fence and bushes need cutting back
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Birchdene Drive, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 12th April
item.description:
There are plastic bottles, food packaging, cans, coffee cups and plastic bags on the road and pavement on Tabard street. It has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafitti on green electrical box, 12th April
item.description:
Grafitti on green electrical box and road sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Rochester Way, Avery Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees, 12th April
item.description:
Trees need cutting
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hampstead Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish, 12th April
item.description:
More and more rubbish has been dumped here.. Can the camera on the lamp post help us finding who did this?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes, 12th April
item.description:
Pot holes all over the M25 from junction 28 to junction 30 clockwise
Report on FixMyStreet
